ddls:
CREATE TABLE "snia_samples" (
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each SNIa sample */,
  "case_name" TEXT /* Name of the SNIa sample (e.g., perfect3000_I) */,
  "n_snia" INTEGER /* Number of SNIa in the sample */,
  "other_types" TEXT /* Other types of supernovae present in the sample (e.g., Ibc, AGN) */,
  "other_codes" TEXT /* Codes for other types of supernovae */,
  "perc_snia" REAL /* Percentage of SNIa in the sample */,
  "perc_others" REAL /* Percentage of other types of supernovae in the sample */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the SNIa sample was collected */,
  "collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the SNIa sample */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the SNIa sample data */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the SNIa sample */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysis_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis result */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the SNIa sample */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the fitting method (e.g., wfit, stan) */,
  "w" REAL /* Best-fit value of w (equation of state) */,
  "w_error" REAL /* Error in w */,
  "om" REAL /* Best-fit value of Ωm (matter density) */,
  "om_error" REAL /* Error in Ωm */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date when the analysis was performed */,
  "analysis_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the analysis */,
  "confidence_interval" TEXT /* Confidence interval for the analysis results */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_results_method_name FOREIGN KEY ("method_name") REFERENCES methods ("method_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_results_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES snia_samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fitting method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the fitting method (e.g., wfit, stan) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the fitting method */,
  "method_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the fitting method */,
  "method_parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used by the fitting method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parameters" (
  "param_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cosmological parameter */,
  "param_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter (e.g., w, Ωm) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the parameter */,
  "param_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the parameter */,
  "param_units" TEXT /* Units of the parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("param_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the user is affiliated with */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user is part of */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the SNIa sample */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analysis result */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the user accessed the data */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used by the user to access the data */,
  "access_browser" TEXT /* Browser used by the user to access the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES analysis_results ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES snia_samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sample_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sample version */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the SNIa sample */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the sample was updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made to the sample */,
  "version_author" TEXT /* User who made the changes to the sample */,
  "version_comments" TEXT /* Comments about the changes made to the sample */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sample_versions_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES snia_samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "result_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result version */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analysis result */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the result was updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made to the result */,
  "version_author" TEXT /* User who made the changes to the result */,
  "version_comments" TEXT /* Comments about the changes made to the result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_result_versions_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES analysis_results ("result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notif_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the SNIa sample */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analysis result */,
  "notif_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "notif_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., new data, updated result) */,
  "notif_priority" TEXT /* Priority of the notification */,
  "notif_status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., read, unread) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notif_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES snia_samples ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES analysis_results ("result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_papers" (
  "paper_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research paper */,
  "paper_title" TEXT /* Title of the research paper */,
  "paper_authors" TEXT /* Authors of the research paper */,
  "paper_journal" TEXT /* Journal where the research paper was published */,
  "paper_year" INTEGER /* Year the research paper was published */,
  "paper_sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the SNIa sample used in the research paper */,
  "paper_result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analysis result used in the research paper */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("paper_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_papers_paper_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("paper_sample_id") REFERENCES snia_samples ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_papers_paper_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("paper_result_id") REFERENCES analysis_results ("result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_grants" (
  "grant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research grant */,
  "grant_title" TEXT /* Title of the research grant */,
  "grant_agency" TEXT /* Agency that provided the research grant */,
  "grant_amount" REAL /* Amount of the research grant */,
  "grant_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the research grant */,
  "grant_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the research grant */,
  "grant_sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the SNIa sample used in the research grant */,
  "grant_result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analysis result used in the research grant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_grants_grant_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("grant_result_id") REFERENCES analysis_results ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_grants_grant_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("grant_sample_id") REFERENCES snia_samples ("sample_id")
)
